commands.command: curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Basic <base64 encoded client_id:client_secret>" -d grant_type=client_credentials https://accounts.spotify.com/api/token

commands.description: Node.js example to get user's playlists
commands.scenario: Node.js example to get user's playlists

commands.command:
import spotipy
from spotipy.oauth2 import SpotifyClientCredentials
sp = spotipy.Spotify(client_credentials_manager=SpotifyClientCredentials())
results = sp.search(q='artist:Queen', type='artist')
print(results)
